title: struthiopteris nipponica var. reflexipinnula
intro: Struthiopteris nipponica var. reflexipinnula, also known as the Japanese strap fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Marattiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the Japanese strap fern is often used in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
